command:
ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge jose@192.168.0.118 '
echo === PHASE B: REPOSITORY CLONE ===

echo --- CLONE FROM GITEA ---
cd /opt/moreno-ai
git init
git remote add origin http://192.168.0.191:3000/jose/Moreno-AI.git
git fetch origin 2>&1 | tail -5
git checkout -b main origin/main 2>&1 | tail -3

echo --- VERIFY ---
git log --oneline -3
git remote -v
git status
ls runtime/*.py | head -10
ls agents/ | head -10
echo OK_CLONE

echo --- VERIFY RUNTIME IMPORTS ---
python3 -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, "/opt/moreno-ai/runtime"); from agent_identity_loader import load_all_agents; print("import OK")" 2>&1

echo === PHASE_B_DONE ===
' 2>&1
